changes_made.description: Replaced 432-line generic git reference with a focused 96-line skill targeting the exact commands needed: branch operations, cherry-pick, tags, log/history analysis, and JSON report writing. Added specific guidance on data types (numbers not strings, booleans not strings), date formats, file placement, and counting semantics.

Added instruction to rename default branch from 'master' to 'main' when encountered. The git-branch-ops task references 'main branch' but git init creates 'master' by default. This fixed the branch-creation criterion from 50% to 100%.
Confirmation run - no changes. Both tasks scored 100/100, confirming stability.
